title: Cinematic Winter Fantasy Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Cinematic Winter Fantasy Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Platform Goal: Create one image asset for both Pinterest and X. It must work as a Pinterest Pin cover and as an X image-hook post that can anchor a prompt thread. Hero Subject: adult woman with snow-dusted dark hair in a heavy fur-lined winter coat beside a calm gray wolf. Scene / Context: snowy pine forest background, frost, soft falling snow and symmetrical watchful composition. Source Recipe Translation: cinematic winter fantasy portrait. Preserve these source mechanics: photoreal cinematic winter portrait, ultra-sharp eye focus, cold blue-gray palette, dramatic atmospheric depth. Concrete social variant uses adult woman with snow-dusted dark hair in a heavy fur-lined winter coat beside a calm gray wolf in snowy pine forest background, frost, soft falling snow and symmetrical watchful composition. Composition: vertical 4:5 or 2:3 social-poster composition with a strong central focal subject and clean negative space; Pinterest-first vertical 4:5 or 2:3 unless the source layout requires otherwise; keep the main subject readable in a small thumbnail and center-safe for X crop previews. Style System: photoreal cinematic winter portrait, ultra-sharp eye focus, cold blue-gray palette, dramatic atmospheric depth; polished editorial finish, strong first-glance contrast, clean hierarchy, no raw prompt text shown in the image. Visible Text: no visible text; English-only readable text if text is part of the design; otherwise no visible text. Social Safety and Publishing Constraints: fictional or generic subjects only, publication-safe, no real logo or unauthorized likeness; no watermark, no random text, no real brand logo, no unauthorized celebrity likeness, no copied IP, no distorted anatomy, no clutter.

imagePrompts.prompt: Platform Goal: Create one image asset for both Pinterest and X. It must work as a Pinterest Pin cover and as an X image-hook post that can anchor a prompt thread. Classification: cinematic winter fantasy portrait. Hero Subject: adult winter wanderer with dark snow-dusted hair standing beside a white stag in a silent frozen forest. Scene or Context: blue-hour snowfall, distant lantern glow, frosted branches and mythic calm atmosphere. Composition: vertical 4:5 cinematic portrait, subject and stag close together, face readable, strong negative space above for poster mood; Pinterest-first vertical 4:5 or 2:3 framing unless the source format is essential; keep the main subject readable at thumbnail size and center-safe for X previews. Style Language: cinematic winter fantasy portrait, realistic skin texture, soft film grain, cool moonlit palette with warm accent glow; high-contrast first-glance hook, polished editorial finish, clean visual hierarchy, no raw prompt text shown in the image. Visible Text: no visible text; use English-only readable text if text is part of the design, otherwise no visible text. Distribution Fit: Designed for a Pinterest Pin cover and an X image post: strong single-image hook, clear subject, clean crop, readable text, and enough visual value to support a prompt-thread or pin description. Restrictions: adult subject, original fantasy scene, no copied IP, no real celebrity likeness, no watermark, no distorted animal anatomy; no watermark, no random text, no real brand logo, no unauthorized celebrity likeness, no copied IP, no distorted anatomy, no clutter. Output: one polished finished image, no collage unless explicitly requested, no raw prompt text outside designed typography.
